title: Sharing Portfolios with Outside Clients

posts.author: Andrea1 (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone run into this issue?

I Need to share underlying portfolios boards and the Portfolio utself with an outside client.

But, if I change to boards to Shareable (from Main), I no longer have the “Overview” and “Project Health” options at the top of the board that link to the Portfolio

How can I make the board be shareable and have access to the “Overview” and “Project Health” options at the top of the board?

Monday 1642×241 35.1 KB

Monday 2650×149 9.38 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: As an alternative to the Portfolio boards the Rollup Multiple Board app support highly configurable RAG status columns and the RMB master board can be shared with external parties just as any other board.
